BETA INDUSTRIES EARNINGS CALL Q1 2024

Operator: Welcome to the Beta Industries earnings call.

CEO: We saw accelerating demand for grid infrastructure this quarter.
Our backlog increased due to renewable energy buildout.
Beta Industries is benefiting from the energy transition.

CFO: Capital expenditure rose to support new transmission projects.
We remain exposed to copper and aluminum input costs.
Beta Industries is sensitive to inflation and interest rate changes.
Our operations span Canada and North America.
